vocab.meaning: trí tưởng tượng không giới hạn/tự do
vocab.example: With my unfettered imagination, I could turn a simple cardboard box into a sophisticated spaceship for my adventures.

vocab.meaning: khám phá thông qua xúc giác (chạm, cầm nắm)
vocab.example: I spent countless hours in tactile exploration, molding shapes out of wet clay or sand in the backyard.
Having a thirst for adventure, my friends and I would often venture into the nearby woods to map out 'secret' trails.

vocab.meaning: hình thức giải trí/lối thoát thư giãn
vocab.example: Swimming in the local lake was my favorite recreational outlet during the sweltering summer months.
I possessed boundless energy as a child, often playing football until the sun dipped below the horizon.
I took great joy in the meticulous assembly of complex Lego sets, following every instruction with absolute precision.

vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách/phát triển
vocab.example: During my formative years, I was obsessed with drawing, which later paved the way for my career in graphic design.

vocab.meaning: giao lưu với bạn bè cùng trang lứa
vocab.example: The local playground was the primary place where I would socialize with peers and learn the art of negotiation through games.
I was an avid reader of fables and myths, which deeply influenced my worldview and creative writing skills.

vocab.meaning: các hoạt động theo đuổi ngoài trời
vocab.example: My parents always encouraged outdoor pursuits, so I spent very little time indoors in front of a screen.
